name: Pate Brisee #2
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour and salt in a bowl.
2. Cut the butter into small pieces to resemble coarse crumbs, then add it to the flour mixture.
3. Beat the egg and water together, then combine with the flour mixture and stir until just combined.
4. Pat the dough into a rectangle and wrap in plastic wrap. Chill for 60 minutes.
5. Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch.
6. Cut the dough to fit a tart or tartlet pan.
7. Press the dough into the pan, pricking with a fork.
8. Partially bake at 375°F (190°C) for 10 minutes.
9. Bake until fully cooked and golden brown, about 4-8 more minutes. Fill as desired.
